page: Amazon Web Services m8idn.4xlarge is a general-purpose, network and EBS-optimized instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with a dedicated Intel processor operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The system provides 16 virtual CPUs mapped to 8 physical cores with 2 threads per core, paired with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This instance includes bundled local storage consisting of a 950 GB NVMe SSD instance store volume. For network connectivity, the m8idn.4xlarge offers a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps. It is optimized for both network throughput and Elastic Block Store performance, ensuring low-latency access to external storage volumes alongside its high-speed local NVMe storage.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the inclusion of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage and dedicated compute resources provides a balanced hardware profile for workloads requiring both processing power and fast local data access without needing separate storage provisioning. This configuration is suitable for general-purpose workloads, relational databases, caching layers, and backend application servers that benefit from high network throughput and local scratch space.
description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.4xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance optimized for network and EBS performance. Powered by the Nitro hypervisor, it features a dedicated Intel processor running at 3.9 GHz with 16 vCPUs, 8 physical cores, and 64.0 GB of RAM. The instance includes a bundled 950 GB NVMe SSD local instance store volume and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps. This hardware profile offers a balanced resource allocation of 4.0 GB of memory per vCPU, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring dedicated compute, fast local storage, and high network throughput. It is suitable for database hosting, caching layers, and general-purpose application serving.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel processors, high-speed local NVMe SSD storage, and optimized network performance.
bullet_points: 16 vCPUs and 64.0 GB of system memory powered by a 3.9 GHz Intel processor
Bundled 950 GB NVMe SSD local instance store volume for high-speed data access
25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with network and EBS optimization
Dedicated CPU allocation with 8 physical cores and Nitro hypervisor integration
Suitable for relational databases, caching layers, and general-purpose application servers
